title: AWS S3 + Athena Analytics Pipeline
overview: Serverless analytics infrastructure processing raw event logs from Amazon S3 through Glue Data Catalog into Athena for sub-second Tableau querying.
challenge: Legacy relational databases suffered from query timeouts when analyzing high-volume web event streams.
solution: Migrated analytics workloads to a serverless AWS S3 data lake configured with Apache Parquet columnar partitioning.
archExplanation: Log streams land in S3; AWS Glue Crawlers update catalog schemas; Athena executes SQL queries consumed live by Tableau Server.
impact: 85% query speed improvement over legacy database
Saved $40K annually in cloud database compute costs
learnings: Partitioning by year/month/day is critical for query cost containment
Parquet file compaction improves Athena scan throughput
